description: Thought-partner subagents (workflow-simplifier, copywriting-partner) — systematize repetitive work, copy/doc coauthoring.

cases.prompt: A team manually copies data from 3 spreadsheets into a weekly report every Friday (2 hours of work). Propose a system to reduce this to under 15 minutes.
Map and simplify an onboarding workflow that currently has 12 approval steps where only 4 add value.
A sales team writes each proposal from scratch (3 hours each). How would you turn this into a template + fill system?
Write 5 headline options for a landing page selling a Thai cooking course. Vary the angle (benefit, curiosity, social proof).
Tighten this: 'In order to be able to commence the process of onboarding, you will need to first of all fill out the form.'
Craft a one-sentence value prop for a budgeting app that rounds up purchases and invests the spare change.
A content review pipeline stalls because one senior reviewer must approve everything. Propose 3 fixes.
Rewrite a formal Thai business email to be warm and modern without losing professionalism.
Turn a vague 'we decide things by feel' hiring process into a scored decision checklist.
Write 3 call-to-action button variants for a free-trial signup. Explain why each works.
